ingredients: 4 green chili peppers, sliced (seeds removed) (for sambal)
Basil stems or leaves, minced (for sambal)
steps: Season the fish with soy sauce and lime juice; let sit briefly while preparing the grill.
Prepare sambal: combine chopped tomato, green pepper, green chilies, shallots and minced basil; season with salt.
Preheat grill to medium-high. Lightly oil the grill grates (or wrap fish in banana leaves if using).
Grill fish, turning as needed, until cooked through (time depends on size; cook until flesh flakes easily).
Serve grilled fish topped with sambal.
tips: Use a fish basket or banana leaves to prevent sticking; keep sambal fresh and add lime to taste just before serving.

sources.title: Ikan Bakar (Indonesian-Style Grilled Fish) with Sambal Colo Colo
